response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical breadth across languages and systems, and demonstrable leadership in open-source and tooling development — including MCP frameworks relevant to the role. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and clear leadership in GenAI customer-facing deployments, which are core to the role.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven track record in building developer tooling and MCP frameworks for agentic workflows
Strong technical leadership demonstrated through open-source projects, workshops, and mentoring
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production AI systems or GenAI deployment
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, or LLM evaluation pipelines
Limited documentation of customer-facing technical leadership in enterprise AI consulting
